name: Gazpacho De Los Angeles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tomato juice, green bell pepper, onion, cucumber, chiles, Worcestershire sauce, seasoning blend, garlic, olive oil, and chives in a large bowl.
2. Stir in hot pepper sauce to taste.
3. If desired, add MSG, salt, and white pepper for flavoring.
4. Mix until well combined.
5. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, or until thoroughly chilled.
6. Serve with lemon wedges.
Note: For a smoother gazpacho served with vegetable garnishes, blend the tomato mixture in a blender container until smooth. Serve with additional diced cucumber, green pepper, and croutons on the side. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
